description_long: This is a modern city bus with a rectangular, elongated body and a predominantly white exterior accented by a dark, likely tinted, window band running along the sides. The bus features a flat front with a large windshield and a black lower grille, as well as side mirrors and multiple circular lights. Along each side, there are several evenly spaced rectangular windows, and two sets of passenger doors are visible, one at the front and one at the middle. The bus rides on six wheels, with two axles at the rear and one at the front, and the wheels are black with metallic hubs. The roof is slightly curved and appears to have rooftop equipment or air conditioning units, and the overall design is streamlined for urban transit.
description: A modern, white city bus with dark side windows, two passenger doors, and six wheels, designed for urban public transportation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large windshield, black grille, and headlights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full row of windows, two passenger doors, and all six wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back window, taillights, and rooftop equipment visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing windows, doors, and wheels.
attribute_window_arrangement: There are six large, rectangular passenger windows on each side, evenly spaced and separated by vertical pillars, with a continuous dark band above the windows.
